description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top for sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is metallic silver with a prominent black Apple logo centered and a vertically aligned dual camera module with flash in the top left corner. The sides are slim and black, with visible buttons for volume and power. The device has a minimalist, premium design typical of recent iPhone models, with a smooth, glossy finish. Its compact size and lightweight build make it easily portable and suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, metallic silver back, and dual rear cameras. Features a black Apple logo and slim black sides with visible buttons.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, edge-to-edge glass screen with a notch at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim profile and placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displays the metallic silver finish, black Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the thinness and additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the metallic silver surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears to be on but displays a minimal, abstract wallpaper with soft pastel gradients and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in a pill-shaped module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both sides: two circular volume buttons and a mute switch on the left edge, and a single elongated power button on the right edge.
